title: OCI Route Table Update
description: Detects changes to VCN Route Tables.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.updateroutetable' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.createroutetable')))
falsepositives: Network infrastructure changes during maintenance windows
